purpose: Evaluate good-product loss versus compute cost for dual-threshold ResNet early exit.

definitions.self_confidence: maximum softmax probability at each exit
definitions.reliable_good_proxy: final exit is correct and final self-confidence meets the calibrated target-accuracy threshold
definitions.good_loss_rate: fraction of all samples that are reliable-good but rejected early
definitions.false_accept_overall_rate: fraction of all samples that are accepted with a wrong terminal prediction
definitions.avg_compute_cost: mean normalized exit cost of the terminal decision
